title: Extract from File node freezing server due to bad compressed size
symptom: The n8n server freezes or crashes when executing the 'Extract from File' node without producing an error message. The log shows a bad compressed size error.
not_this_if: The node executes successfully without freezing
The 'Read as string' option is off
root_cause: The 'Extract from File' node may attempt to read the file incorrectly when the 'Read as string' option is enabled, leading to a mismatch in expected data size and causing the server to freeze.
fix_steps: Open the 'Extract from File' node settings
Turn off the 'Read as string' option
agent_instruction: Turn off the 'Read as string' option in the 'Extract from File' node settings.
